name: gather-perspective
title: Gather Perspective
description: Collects a single team member's perspective on a question posed by the product owner.

triggerInput.name: userId
triggerInput.description: ID of the team member providing perspective

triggerInput.name: question
triggerInput.description: The question posed by the product owner

steps.name: Show question
steps.description: Renders the PO's question as a presentation card visible in the next step's context panel.

steps.name: Provide perspective
steps.description: Team member provides their perspective on the PO's question.

params.name: perspective
params.description: Share your thoughts on the question above
